name: profile-suggest flags a government signal when README mentions FedRAMP, NIST 800-53, or FISMA
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '# Agency Tools\nThis system targets FedRAMP Moderate and NIST 800-53 Rev5 controls.\n' > repo/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'government=detected' out.txt && grep -q 'fedramp' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
